title: Torben's Project
description: A modpack that gives plenty to do and explore, with a focus towards giving as many mods and features as much balance as possible to encourage use of all of them!
body:
Welcome!

If your looking for a modpack that has:
- Plenty to explore!
- Thousands of blocks to build with and mods to give them function!
- Social/Player features to maximise entertainment between friends!
- Continued support and additions to keep you hooked!

Then this is for you!
